name: Archontic Longinomechanical Pneuma-Engineering Bay
flavor: We scaled the walls of Ogdoad and devoured the knowledge therein and by their own hands crafted a new sun that illuminated the lands of Heaven in an earthly light.
primaryUnlock: Unlocks HALO units for deployment and unlocks the following options:

name: ANCILIA Tactical Production
flavor: In the dawnless age that passed, Man left the bounds of the world and walked among the stars. The seeds of Belias grew fruitful in their hands and they made footprints on alien sand.
primaryUnlock: Unlocks the Equipment slot for all HELLPIERCERS and unlocks the following options:

name: PRONOIA Arms Modification Protocols
flavor: Akkadia-Babylon spoke the secret words and invoked the secret fire in the open sky and rose the Mountain Fortress of Babel against the Archons at the end of the age of Mars.
primaryUnlock: Unlocks the Gear Slot for all HELLPIERCERS and unlocks the following options:

name: APONOIA Expedited Enlightenment Process
flavor: The wisest of the us saw through these tricks, and remembering the words of Hosanna, and the shape of Sophia, and the ruins of the Archon's earthly fortresses smote down the Archon Adonaios who was the sun of this place and plunged it into a darkness alike the darkness of the earth and this marked the dawn of the War in Heaven.
primaryUnlock: Unlocks the Limit Break ability for all classes and unlocks the following options:

name: ANOINT Reality Manipulation Development
flavor: She wrote her name on the silver moon above the tree and saw upon the horizon the Archons legions approaching…
primaryUnlock: Unlocks Pre-Battle Tactical Grid Manipulation and unlocks the following options:

name: CHOIC Spatial Manipulation Sigil Development
flavor: And the wiseman set himself in the bread and the tears of the world and in time all came to see this truth and light again and rose triumphant and tepid as a second union of gnosis.
primaryUnlock: Unlocks a second weapon slot for all classes and unlocks the following options:

name: SYZYGOS Automated Adulation Suite
flavor: The fall of the heavenly sun brought forth the awakening of a great many things. Those who slew him regained their skins of gold and their eyes of gold and their tears of gold, and wept for the great pains of Humanity were revealed to them at once.
primaryUnlock: Unlocks Roles for all players and unlocks the following options:

name: AGNOIA Triumph Chamber
flavor: In the cold silence the gilded ones found their way back home, and they met with Eve-Sophia and laid in blood the Covenant of Seth, and the veil was lifted.
primaryUnlock: Unlocks the Triumph system and unlocks the following options:

name: HEBDOMAS Aerial Support Wing
flavor: Forgotten Sophia rose in the sky and covered the world with her body and held together the cracks of the world and her love suffused the world and took upon herself the 148 Suffering.
primaryUnlock: Unlocks the Off-Grid Munitions Support and unlocks the following options:

name: EROS Management Vault Systems
flavor: But there laid in silence a final hidden place, abandoned by the archons and forgotten by all the eyes of all the worlds. Humanity's lost children wept and their cries echoed through the halls of Apocryphon and so began the Great Mourning.
primaryUnlock: Unlocks Legendary Arms and unlocks the following options:

name: GNOSTIC Synthesis Chamber
flavor: In the beginning, there was light and sound and glory. In the world outside of worlds, the pleroma rang like a golden bell with the elation of all things, and in the center of it the Monad.
primaryUnlock: Unlocks Cross-Class Development system for all players, and unlocks the following options:

name: Synthetic Spinther Manufacturing Lab
flavor: With the lens of final truth Humanity peered into the void and saw golden pathways illuminated by their own forgotten flesh and they followed them to Valentia, the unassailed fortress of the Archons.
primaryUnlock: Unlocks Vehicles for deployment and unlocks the following options:

name: Ignorance-Devouring Hyper-Spatial Anchor
flavor: In these days a wiseman traveled to the crown of Babylon and beseeched its rulers to hear his truth and from his lips he spoke Gnosis as a mirrored sword and the darkness melted from the crown and its holder.
primaryUnlock: Unlocks Reversals for all players and unlocks the following options:
